The '''Kliap Pirates''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] organization that was active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were infamous for the flashy raids they carried out in the [[Kliap sector/Legends|Kliap sector]]. The [[Venithon Twins]] worked for this organization for a time.
